name: Koakuma
description:
The little devil from the Touhou Project.

Art made by プーアカちゃん🐇 (puakachan).

Another bot just dropped. Part 2 of the 6 part Scarlet Devil Mansion series. From this point I'll drop the bots more frequently. Also I changed the writing format a bit, might do it to my older bots but idk. Thanks and enjoy!
creator: Wholesome Sablin
